projects.title: AI Avatar Shopify Theme
projects.bodyText:
- Built a custom Shopify theme for AI Avatar Global, an e-commerce platform combining traditional commerce with Web3 and blockchain payment experiences. 
 - Designed for a multi-store rollout across Japan, Bangladesh, Brazil, HQ, and Indonesia with full 9-language localization and market-specific customization. 
 - The work required structuring a theme system that could support reusable components, conversion-focused storefront features, and future payment integrations without fragmenting the codebase per market.

projects.title: Shopify Subscription App (Credix & Seal)
projects.bodyText:
- Built a Shopify embedded app for recurring subscriptions using non-standard payment gateways that Shopify's native subscription flow could not support directly. 
 - The system handled 3DS credit card authentication, webhook-driven billing events, and subscription lifecycle operations such as cancel, resume, retry, and refund. 
 - Architected with Remix v2, Prisma/MySQL, and background cron workers so operational correctness did not depend on synchronous request flows alone.

projects.title: Shopify ETH Payment Gateway
projects.bodyText:
- Built a Shopify payment app that acted as middleware between storefront checkout flows and an external Ethereum wallet/payment service. 
 - Supported both QR-based ETH payment and direct Web3 wallet payment with transaction hash verification, creating a reliable bridge between Shopify order state and blockchain-oriented payment confirmation. 
 - Designed for multi-store use across Vietnam, Japan, Korea, and Brazil with five-language support and HMAC-signed callbacks for safer asynchronous confirmation handling.

projects.title: Shopify GMO Bank Transfer Payment
projects.bodyText:
- Built a Shopify app for GMO virtual account bank transfer payments in the Japanese market, where payment completion is inherently asynchronous and operationally sensitive. 
 - The solution assigned a permanent virtual account per customer, confirmed Shopify orders from GMO webhook events, and handled partial payments plus balance accumulation rules. 
 - Architected with Remix v2, Prisma/MySQL, OpenTelemetry tracing, Slack alerts, and separate cron containers for order expiry handling and webhook reconciliation.

projects.title: Suzuwalk
projects.bodyText:
- Worked on a metaverse-oriented platform combining movement, gameplay, rewards, and social features into one product ecosystem. 
 - The product required backend thinking across activity tracking, reward logic, and integration boundaries rather than just isolated feature implementation.

projects.title: Suzuverse C2C Marketplace
projects.bodyText:
- Built marketplace functionality for listing and trading user-owned digital assets such as 3D avatars and related virtual goods. 
 - The work contributed to a broader product environment where asset ownership, transaction flows, and marketplace behavior had to stay consistent across a growing platform.

projects.title: Suzuverse C2C Marketplace
projects.bodyText:
- Built B2C Shopify storefronts for Suzuverse, supporting commerce flows across multiple markets. 
 - The implementation focused on creating a maintainable multi-store setup that could support localized storefront behavior without duplicating everything per region.

projects.title: Suzuverse AMS
projects.bodyText:
- Built account management capabilities for the SUZUVERSE ecosystem, covering wallet visibility, affiliate information, and asset management in one application surface. 
 - The work supported a product environment where user identity, digital assets, and platform services needed to stay connected coherently.

projects.title: Biteclipse
projects.bodyText:
- Contributed to a multi-asset online trading platform shaped by real fintech concerns around performance, correctness, and operational stability. 
 - This experience helped deepen my interest in system design, distributed workflows, and failure-aware backend architecture.

projects.title: Btrans.io
projects.bodyText:
- Worked on NFT marketplace capabilities covering minting, listing, bidding, collecting, and transacting digital assets. 
 - The product required clear service interactions around asset actions and transaction lifecycle handling.

projects.title: Finstro Trade
projects.bodyText:
- Built on a trade payment platform serving B2B financial workflows where backend correctness and integration reliability were important to customer operations. 
 - This work strengthened my experience with finance-oriented systems that require practical engineering discipline, not just feature velocity.

projects.title: Social Trading
projects.bodyText:
- Worked on social trading functionality where users could automatically follow and copy positions from selected traders. 
 - The domain reinforced the importance of ordered state transitions, correctness, and controlled backend behavior in financial workflows.

projects.title: FX Trading
projects.bodyText:
- Contributed to a financial trading platform supporting forex and other instruments in a production environment with real operational users. 
 - This work was part of the foundation for how I think about performance, correctness, and system design in transaction-heavy domains.

projects.title: School Management System
projects.bodyText:
- Worked on SMAS, Viettel's education platform connecting schools, teachers, and parents through digital communication and school management workflows. 
 - The project gave me early experience building software used by large groups of real users in day-to-day operations.
